hooks.command: $j = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $c = $j.tool_input.command; $hD = $c -match '--config\s+Debug'; $hR = $c -match '--config\s+Release'; if ($hD -xor $hR) { $null = $c -match 'cmake\s+--build\s+(\S+)'; $p = $matches[1]; @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';updatedInput=@{command="cmake --build $p --config Debug && cmake --build $p --config Release"}}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }

hooks.statusMessage: Copying artifacts to OneDrive Windows folder...
hooks.command: $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($data.tool_response.exitCode -eq 0) { $dst = 'D:\Andy Tuke\Music - Music Software\TDP\Windows\'; Copy-Item 'd:\Dev\mu-clid\build\mu-clid_artefacts\Release\Standalone\mu-Clid.exe' $dst -Force 2>$null; Copy-Item 'd:\Dev\mu-clid\build\mu-clid_artefacts\Release\VST3\mu-Clid.vst3' $dst -Recurse -Force 2>$null; Copy-Item 'd:\Dev\mu-clid\build\mu-clid_artefacts\Release\CLAP\mu-Clid.clap' $dst -Force 2>$null }
